metadata.description: Shape of one model deployment entry in azure.yaml.
Shape of a single model deployment.
Azure region for all resources.
Name of the resource group to create and deploy resources into.
Tags applied to all resources.
Optional salt to vary resource names across re-provisions.
Foundry project name. 3-32 alphanumeric/hyphen chars.
Model deployments to provision on the Foundry account.
Include an Azure Container Registry. Set true when any agent uses docker:.
Object id of the developer running azd. When set, grants Cognitive Services User on the project. Empty disables the role assignment so headless / CI runs do not fail.
Principal type used in the developer role assignment.
Master switch: when true the account is VNet-bound (private).
Network mode: "byo" or "managed". Empty when isolation is off.
ARM id of the existing customer VNet (byo mode).
Agent (delegated) subnet name.
Agent subnet CIDR. Empty derives a /24 from the VNet space.
When true, create the agent subnet; when false, reference it.
Private-endpoint subnet name.
Private-endpoint subnet CIDR. Empty derives a /24 from the VNet space.
When true, create the PE subnet; when false, reference it.
Managed-network isolation mode (managed mode).
Resource group holding existing private DNS zones. Empty creates new zones.
Subscription holding existing private DNS zones. Empty defaults to this subscription.
Shape of one model deployment entry in azure.yaml.
Shape of a single model deployment.
Azure region for all resources.
Tags applied to all resources.
Optional salt to vary resource names across re-provisions.
Foundry project name. 3-32 alphanumeric/hyphen chars.
Model deployments to provision on the Foundry account.
Include an Azure Container Registry. Set true when any agent uses docker:.
Object id of the developer running azd. When set, grants Cognitive Services User on the project. Empty disables the role assignment so headless / CI runs do not fail.
Principal type used in the developer role assignment.
Master switch: when true the account is VNet-bound (private).
Network mode: "byo" (customer VNet) or "managed" (Foundry-managed VNet). Empty when isolation is off.
ARM id of the existing customer VNet (byo mode).
Agent (delegated) subnet name.
Agent subnet CIDR. Empty derives a /24 from the VNet space.
When true, create the agent subnet; when false, reference it.
Private-endpoint subnet name.
Private-endpoint subnet CIDR. Empty derives a /24 from the VNet space.
When true, create the PE subnet; when false, reference it.
Managed-network isolation mode (managed mode). AllowInternetOutbound | AllowOnlyApprovedOutbound.
Resource group holding existing private DNS zones. Empty creates and links new zones.
Subscription holding existing private DNS zones. Empty defaults to this subscription.

variables.resourceToken: [if(empty(parameters('resourceTokenSalt')), uniqueString(subscription().id, resourceGroup().id, parameters('location')), uniqueString(subscription().id, resourceGroup().id, parameters('location'), parameters('resourceTokenSalt')))]
variables.agentNetworkInjections: [if(variables('useByoNetwork'), createArray(createObject('scenario', 'agent', 'subnetArmId', variables('agentSubnetArmId'), 'useMicrosoftManagedNetwork', false())), if(variables('useManagedNetwork'), createArray(createObject('scenario', 'agent', 'useMicrosoftManagedNetwork', true())), null()))]

metadata.description: ARM resource id of the existing customer VNet.
Name of the agent (delegated) subnet.
CIDR for the agent subnet. Empty derives a /24 from the VNet space.
When true, create the agent subnet; when false, reference it.
Name of the private-endpoint subnet.
CIDR for the private-endpoint subnet. Empty derives a /24 from the VNet space.
When true, create the PE subnet; when false, reference it.

parameters.addressPrefix: [if(empty(parameters('agentSubnetPrefix')), createObject('value', cidrSubnet(reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', variables('vnetSubscriptionId'), variables('vnetResourceGroupName')), 'Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', variables('vnetName')), '2024-05-01').addressSpace.addressPrefixes[0], 24, 0)), createObject('value', parameters('agentSubnetPrefix')))]

metadata.description: Name of the virtual network the subnet belongs to.
Name of the subnet to create.
CIDR for the subnet.
Subnet delegations (e.g. Microsoft.App/environments for the agent subnet).

subnetId.value: [resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('vnetName'), parameters('subnetName')), '/')[0], split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('vnetName'), parameters('subnetName')), '/')[1])]

parameters.addressPrefix: [if(empty(parameters('peSubnetPrefix')), createObject('value', cidrSubnet(reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', variables('vnetSubscriptionId'), variables('vnetResourceGroupName')), 'Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', variables('vnetName')), '2024-05-01').addressSpace.addressPrefixes[0], 24, 1)), createObject('value', parameters('peSubnetPrefix')))]

metadata.description: Name of the virtual network the subnet belongs to.
Name of the subnet to create.
CIDR for the subnet.
Subnet delegations (e.g. Microsoft.App/environments for the agent subnet).

subnetId.value: [resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('vnetName'), parameters('subnetName')), '/')[0], split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('vnetName'), parameters('subnetName')), '/')[1])]

metadata.description: Azure region.
Tags applied to all resources.
Registry name. 5-50 alphanumeric chars.
Name of the existing Foundry CognitiveServices account that hosts the project receiving the ACR connection.
Name of the existing Foundry project receiving the ACR connection.
Principal id of the Foundry project managed identity; receives AcrPull and is the connection credential identity.
Name of the Foundry (AIServices) account to bind the private endpoint to.
ARM resource id of the customer VNet.
ARM resource id of the private-endpoint subnet.
Suffix for unique resource/link names.
Resource group holding existing private DNS zones. Empty creates and links new zones.
Subscription holding existing private DNS zones. Empty defaults to this subscription.
